ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Model name of the car */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the manufacturer details */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Manufacturing year of the car */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., petrol, diesel, electric) */,
  "mileage" REAL /* Mileage of the car */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the car */,
  "buying" TEXT /* Buying cost of the car (e.g., vhigh, high, med, low) */,
  "maint" TEXT /* Maintenance cost of the car (e.g., vhigh, high, med, low) */,
  "doors" TEXT /* Number of doors in the car (e.g., 2, 3, 4, 5more) */,
  "persons" TEXT /* Number of persons the car can accommodate (e.g., 2, more, 4) */,
  "lug_boot" TEXT /* Size of the luggage boot (e.g., small, med, big) */,
  "safety" TEXT /* Safety features of the car (e.g., low, med, high) */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the car based on evaluation (e.g., unacc, acc, good, vgood) */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the car was evaluated */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the evaluator details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_persons FOREIGN KEY ("persons") REFERENCES person_capacity ("person_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_doors FOREIGN KEY ("doors") REFERENCES door_counts ("door_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_maint FOREIGN KEY ("maint") REFERENCES maintenance_costs ("maint_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_safety FOREIGN KEY ("safety") REFERENCES safety_features ("safety_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_lug_boot FOREIGN KEY ("lug_boot") REFERENCES lug_boot_sizes ("lug_boot_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_buying FOREIGN KEY ("buying") REFERENCES buying_costs ("buying_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "evaluator_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the evaluator (e.g., administrator, evaluator, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation criterion */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation criterion */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation result */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the car */,
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the evaluation criterion */,
  "score" REAL /* Score obtained for the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_criteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("criteria_id") REFERENCES evaluation_criteria ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buying_costs" (
  "buying_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buying cost category */,
  "buying_name" TEXT /* Name of the buying cost category (e.g., vhigh, high, med, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the buying cost category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buying_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_costs" (
  "maint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance cost category */,
  "maint_name" TEXT /* Name of the maintenance cost category (e.g., vhigh, high, med, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance cost category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "door_counts" (
  "door_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each door count category */,
  "door_name" TEXT /* Name of the door count category (e.g., 2, 3, 4, 5more) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the door count category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("door_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "person_capacity" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person capacity category */,
  "person_name" TEXT /* Name of the person capacity category (e.g., 2, more, 4) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the person capacity category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lug_boot_sizes" (
  "lug_boot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each luggage boot size category */,
  "lug_boot_name" TEXT /* Name of the luggage boot size category (e.g., small, med, big) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the luggage boot size category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lug_boot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_features" (
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety feature category */,
  "safety_name" TEXT /* Name of the safety feature category (e.g., low, med, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the safety feature category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_id")
)
